concept: May I suggest a strategy game where players command a network of sentient fungi that communicate and expand through underground mycelium networks? Resource nodes must be connected via mycelium pathways, but each connection also transmits threats like predatory insects or competing fungi. Special fruiting bodies (mushrooms) can be grown at network junctions to serve as defensive structures, nutrient processors, or spore launchers to colonize distant areas. The environment experiences seasonal changes requiring adaptation of your network structure and specialization patterns. Victory comes when your mycelium network achieves total ecosystem dominance by forming symbiotic relationships with all plant life.
